description:
Legal record (#35) in a court register/pinqas from a Rabbanite beit din in Cairo (on f. 9r of BL OR 6356). In Hebrew. Location: Cairo. Dated 2 Nisan 5443 AM, which is 1683 CE. 

(Document #35) Charitable payment agreement for supporting the orphans Senyora and Perla, young daughters of the deceased Yiṣḥaq Ḥazaq. A certain Raḥamīm b. Elʿazar Naqīb commits to donate 28 Ottoman gold şerifi to the orphans via ʿImmanuʾel aka Confrado Munes (who is presumably the young girls' guardian/apotropos). Raḥamīm agrees to pay 2 şerifi per month, one every fifteen days. Unless there were two recently deceased men in Cairo named Elʿazar Naqīb (an uncommon surname), Raḥamīm was likely the brother of Ḥabība, widow of Moshe Jawwānī, daughter of Elʿazar Naqīb. MCD.
description_he: רשומה משפטית (#35) בפנקס בית דין רבני בקהיר (BL OR 6356, דף 9r); בעברית; ב' ניסן ה'תמ"ג (1683 לספירה); תשלום צדקה לתמיכה ביתומות סניורה ופרלה, בנות יצחק חזק; רחמים בן אלעזר נקיב מתחייב לתרום 28 שֶׂרִיפִי עות'מאני, 2 לחודש
